sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111579" key="filo/fwnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλό-φωνος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111579.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of talking, noisy,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.1125c</biblScope> </bibl>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ φ.</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">967b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
